A quiet test page for local translation

This fixture contains ordinary article text, inline links, and several semantic block types. It is intentionally small enough for manual extension testing.

The original page must remain readable while translation is running. Visit this example link to confirm inline content is preserved.

A translation should appear near this quotation without interpreting translated text as HTML.
  1. Visible content should receive the highest queue priority.
  2. List numbering should remain stable after translations are inserted.
console.log("Code blocks are excluded in the first version.");
